title: clutia abyssinica var. pedicellaris
intro: Clutia abyssinica var. pedicellaris, also known as a variety of the Clutia abyssinica plant, is a medicinal plant species belonging to the Phyllanthaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Clutia abyssinica var. pedicellaris include its use in treating fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by extracting the plant's oils and resins to create tinctures and ointments.
